---
title: "Dublin Life"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<video class="hero-video-only" autoplay muted loop playsinline>
  <source src="images/dublin-life-6.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

# Dublin Life

A glimpse into my life in Dublin — study, city moments, friendships, and the quiet memories that shape my everyday experience.

<div class="media-gallery">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-1.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 1" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(0, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-2.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 2" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(1, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-3.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 3" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(2, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-8.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 8" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(3, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-9.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 9" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(4, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-10.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 10" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(5, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-11.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 11" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(6, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-12.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 12" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(7, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-13.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 13" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(8, dublinMedia)">
  <img src="images/dublin-life-14.jpg" alt="Dublin Life 14" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(9, dublinMedia)">
  <div class="video-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(10, dublinMedia)">▶ Video 1</div>
  <div class="video-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(11, dublinMedia)">▶ Video 2</div>
</div>

<script>
const dublinMedia = [
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-1.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-2.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-3.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-8.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-9.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-10.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-11.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-12.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-13.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/dublin-life-14.jpg"},
  {type: "video", src: "images/dublin-life-6.mp4"},
  {type: "video", src: "images/dublin-life-7.mp4"}
];
</script>

<script src="gallery.js"></script>
